Issue: Lack of specific user roles and permissions
Correction: Include a requirement specifying different user roles and their permissions, e.g., "The system shall support different user roles such as Admin, User, and Guest, each with specific permissions."

Issue: Incomplete description of the user interface
Correction: Provide a detailed description of each component of the user interface, e.g., "The main window shall include a toolbar with icons for quick access to common functions such as open, save, and run."

Label: /F10/

Correction: Include a requirement for error handling, e.g., "The system shall display an error message if the PCAP file fails to load."

Label: /F20/

Correction: Include a requirement for validation, e.g., "The system shall validate the preprocessor configuration before running it and display an error message if the configuration is invalid."

Label: /F30/

Correction: Include a requirement specifying the algorithm used, e.g., "The system shall use the Force-Directed Graph Drawing algorithm to generate the network topology graph."

Label: /F40/

Correction: Include a requirement for handling large datasets, e.g., "The system shall implement clustering techniques to manage the display of large datasets in the visual representation."

Label: /F50/

Correction: Include a requirement specifying the calculation method, e.g., "The system shall calculate the training, validation, and test accuracy using the mean squared error (MSE) method."

Label: /F60/

Correction: Include a requirement specifying zoom limits, e.g., "The system shall allow zooming in and out of graphs up to a maximum of 500% and a minimum of 10%."

Label: /F70/

Correction: Include a requirement specifying file formats, e.g., "The system shall support saving graphs in PNG, JPEG, and PDF formats."

Label: /F80/

Label: /F100/
